signals.title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund

signals.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
Astrobotic says sale to Voyager will allow it to scale up
signals.summary:
Lunar lander developer Astrobotic decided to sell to Voyager Technologies so it could quickly scale up to meet the projected demands of NASA’s lunar base initiative. 
 The post  Astrobotic says sale to Voyager will allow it to scale up  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
signals.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.

signals.title: NASA selects mission to study space weather interaction with Earth’s atmosphere
signals.summary:
NASA has selected for development a space science mission that will study how space weather interacts with Earth’s atmosphere. 
 The post  NASA selects mission to study space weather interaction with Earth’s atmosphere  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Mu-g Technologies enters the parabolic flight business
signals.summary:
A startup has acquired an aircraft to offer commercial parabolic flight services even as NASA seeks to acquire its own aircraft for reduced-gravity research. 
 The post  Mu-g Technologies enters the parabolic flight business  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: India’s Jio lays out sovereign LEO constellation plan ahead of IPO
signals.summary:
Jio Platforms, which owns India’s largest telco, is looking to lease broadband capacity from satellite constellations to jumpstart its own sovereign LEO network in the country. 
 The post  India’s Jio lays out sovereign LEO constellation plan ahead of IPO  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
signals.summary: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.

signals.title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market

signals.title: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway

signals.title: Austrian propulsion startup joins sovereign space funding surge

signals.title: Army launches new Indo-Pacific multi-domain command

signals.title: Troop cuts in Europe: Giving away something for nothing

signals.title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
signals.summary: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.

signals.summary: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.

signals.title: Homeowners tapped $47 billion in equity in the first quarter. What to consider before you borrow
